commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Isaiah said, Take a lump of figs. And they took and laid it on the boil, and he recovered. Figs; dried. They are very serviceable in various disorders of the throat, to mollify (Pliny, xxiii. Jerome (in Isaias xxxviii. ) acknowledges that they might help to removed the disorder. Grotius is of a contrary opinion; (Calmet) and this would enhance the miracle. (Menochius) At any rate, the discovery of this remedy to the prophet, and its sudden efficacy, were miraculous.
